name: No one else at work has hearing loss, does that kill my claim?

mainEntity.name: No one else at work has hearing loss, does that kill my claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, individual susceptibility varies; your claim stands on personal medical proof and exposure.** Not all exposed develop loss equally due to genetics, protection compliance.[1][2] Coworker affidavits help but not required. Focus on your audiograms and dosimetry.[4] Solo claims succeed often.
